List PAINTOR annotation BED files

Source: R/PAINTOR_fetch_annotations.R
PAINTOR_list_annotations.Rd

List all BED annotation files from the PAINTOR functional annotation library, optionally filtered by category keyword.

PAINTOR_list_annotations(annot_dir, categories = NULL, verbose = TRUE)

Arguments

annot_dir

Path to the extracted annotations directory (from PAINTOR_fetch_annotations).

categories

Character vector of category keywords to filter by (e.g., "FANTOM5", "ChromHMM", "DHS", "TFBS"). If NULL, returns all BED files.

verbose

Print messages.

Value

Character vector of BED file paths.

Contents

Developed by Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
